blended.narrative: Jay Peak is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 26 ft. Looking ahead, 22 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 7" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Tuesday: 4" of snow, highs of 46°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Wednesday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 26°F.
